commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a bounded Active Memory search-query section and metadata stripping to the recall subagent prompt, updates focused tests and changelog text, and includes a session-entry reserved-slot update.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main keeps Active Memory as a blocking before_prompt_build path that awaits embedded recall, and the linked issue provides repeated timeout logs. I did not run a live gateway/provider reproduction in this read-only review.
